steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says romantic paintings "______ their subjects' beauty or heroism while hiding all imperfection." The contrast with realism (which portrays experiences accurately) and the phrase 'while hiding all imperfection' indicate the blank must describe actively emphasizing or highlighting positive qualities.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "counteract": To counteract means to work against something. But romantic painters were not working against beauty or heroism — they were promoting those qualities. ✗
  • "accentuate": To accentuate means to emphasize or make more prominent. Romantics accentuated beauty and heroism while concealing flaws — exactly the contrast the passage describes. ✓
  • "rectify": To rectify means to correct a mistake or error. Beauty and heroism are not errors to be corrected. ✗
  • "obscure": To obscure means to hide or conceal. But 'hiding' already appears in the same clause for imperfection — using obscure for beauty and heroism would mean the painters were hiding those qualities too, which contradicts the passage. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
